violations.description: Ensures the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary: Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.38 (foreground color: #de3131, background color: #fafafa, font size: 7.5pt (10px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

incomplete.description: Ensures ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
